saturday.notes: Four routes available — pick your distance!

runs.label: Track Night
runs.workout:
1mi warmup at 6:30pm (arrive earlier for longer warmup)
6:40pm we begin intervals
3x1200 (400, 2.5min), 4x400 (200, 1min)
1mi cooldown

Modified:
1200 (400), 2x800 (400), 2x400 (200)

runs.label: Special Event
runs.notes: A 7mi loop around Hopewell/Sourlands, ending with some wine!  Families welcome.  Winery opens at noon so we should all be finished around then.
